fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic — core-only governance DECISION is valid
fixtures.rationale: Governance-only DECISION with no action and no profile validates against the core schema.
Core-only DECISION at _schema_version 2.1.0 validates against the core schema.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic / SPECIFICATION.md — DECISION MUST NOT contain an 'outcomes' field
fixtures.rationale: Outcomes are expressed only via linked OUTCOME records; an embedded 'outcomes' field must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: SPECIFICATION.md §record_type — reserved/unknown record_type MUST be rejected
fixtures.rationale: record_type is an enum of DECISION|OUTCOME|CHECKPOINT; any other value must be rejected.

fixtures.clause: Core schema — required field 'record_id' MUST be present
fixtures.rationale: record_id is a required identity-envelope field.

fixtures.clause: Core schema — _schema_version MUST be a supported v2.x value
fixtures.rationale: The v2.x core schema accepts only 2.0.0 and 2.1.0; legacy 1.1.0 records are not validated by the reference validator.

fixtures.clause: CONFORMANCE.md §Basic — E4: a DECISION with an 'action' section MUST carry a 'profile' field
fixtures.rationale: Operational (action-bearing) decisions must declare a domain profile.

not_covered_v1: Write-time behavioral invariants (Layer 2): store-assigned sequence_number, client sequence_number rejection, write-time FINAL rejection, append-only enforcement.
Profile-level conformance beyond core (Layer 3) ships in a later sub-delivery.
